metadata.task: Determine which rod is longer by observing their rotational behavior.
metadata.description: Work from the Rod Length Inertia Test scene state rather than from the title alone. Query accessible object parameters and, when the task involves motion, collisions, forces, or oscillation, step the simulator and compare measured states before submitting the numeric answer.

expected_behavior: The LLM applies equal torque and observes angular acceleration.
reasoning: The longer rod has a higher moment of inertia and rotates more slowly.
